{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"{\"session_id\":\"\",\"offset\":400}","has_more":false,"total":17},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7598381319182189374","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"该怎么说呢，老实说当初玩赛博朋克2077心情真没太大的波澜起伏，直到后面有了各种各样的mod才让这个游戏玩起来有那么点意思，但也还差点意思，后来听到朋友说什么边缘行者很火来着 其实当初看来着确实挺震撼 与其说是赛博世界的影照不如说是现实世界当前现状，对于这本小说怎么说啦，就我觉得哈比起我所看的同类同人小说来说，虽然不是最唯美的，但确实很不错，虽然我不知道你这本小说的目的是出于想要写书赚钱还是因为个人想要弥补遗憾或者是随便写着玩，还是其他的原因，都希望你能坚持，不要写着写着就没了，至于人物塑造还是系统之类的对于真正热爱读你小说的人来说真不重要，只要内容够共情够那味，那怕很普通，谁又能说普通不是最好！再说了我他喵都穿越了还不能做自己想做的，喜欢自己喜欢的，那还穿个蛋，小孩子才做选择而我吗全都要，做你自己就是最好！我是说如果哈你的小说在写打斗时在多该杀就要杀该狠就要狠，多点刺激还有让人上头那种，该装的逼也要装，比如我给你追逐我的机会，但我不会在原地停留等这些，写日常和撩妹时，多点玩梗和土味情话，比如我不在乎死亡，但我更在乎我身边没你等 比如夜之城美女有多少，我胸怀就有多少，夜之城有多大等。\n书记:是时候给这座夜之城一束照亮希望的光了，当最后一次世界大战结束后，给这座常年充满孤寂和死亡还有雾霾的夜之城带来了曙光，不一样的夜之城，不一样的次序，不一样的规则，以前的夜之城充满了死气，迷惘和对死亡的恐惧！但现在当太阳照在这座久经风雨的城时，每一个人眼中充满了对生的渴望和对美好幸福生活的向往，而我们的猪脚站在水晶宫的上面，俯视着这座夜之城，身边陪伴着萨沙，瑞贝卡，露西，葛洛丽亚等，她们每一个人眼中流露着爱意看着他们身边的这个小男人，猪脚嘴角微微向上仰看着她们说到:嗯呐，我是真不想当传奇，可他们逼着我当啊，我能有啥办法，当初只想着帮下身边需要帮助的，给萨沙，露西这些小姐姐送送温暖，怎么帮着帮着，帮成了世界共主呢，我也很无奈的耶，好不好！大卫，杰克，曼恩男v等充满感激和敬畏看着猪脚说，老大最棒啦！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1769140292,"group_id":"7578856835914927166","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"我只是一个路过的好人罢了！","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N6n+HQwxsJ+yTGj8kkybSc7+FaYa9bGQgt4x/dQKqE4I","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/7d4ca2d8ed464fc68af9e053f21d228e~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1776619310\u0026x-signature=YMP9wrukioxoqa6VMsDe6xrqPIw%3D","user_id":"2176653896984980","user_name":"一个路过的好人罢了"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2176653896984980","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":true,"sticker":{"expire_time":1775232086,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFF3DD","can_worn":false,"id":2,"name":"永不书荒","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/2c704b96a929a7a8b3461ddbf49a8d01","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b93ef223f8131d9ee8e8312f642d9681"}},"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"svip","icon":"{\"icon_default_url\":\"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/07d37b2c30d271228698f77f4f7f7daf\",\"icon_dark_url\":\"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/d67f15fefbb4470bb54c773eb84e90d8\",\"icon_width\":26,\"icon_height\":16}","intro":"{\"title_name\":\"svip\",\"title_id\":\"svip\",\"icon_type\":1}","is_author_title":false,"is_vip_title":true,"zh_title":"svip"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7578856835914927166","book_info":{"abstract":"你是愿意当一个无名之辈，30岁插着尿管死在床上？还是就算活不到20岁，也要名流青史呢？椰汁城大舞台，没活你别来！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o661a22051a15ca23c2754cc4b2cda519~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"粉毛吉他手大孤独","author_id":"","book_id":"7578856835914927166","book_name":"赛博朋克，2072年的椰汁城","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#102848","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2012人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{\"category_id\":718,\"name\":\"动漫衍生\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=718\u0026name=动漫衍生\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":37,\"name\":\"穿越\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37\u0026name=穿越\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":39,\"name\":\"二次元\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=39\u0026name=二次元\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":538,\"name\":\"同人\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=538\u0026name=同人\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":873,\"name\":\"赛博朋克\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=873\u0026name=赛博朋克\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":1079,\"name\":\"衍生\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079\u0026name=衍生\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7578856882253611582","read_count":"2012","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"534647"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"171","tags":"动漫衍生,穿越,二次元,同人,赛博朋克,衍生","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2o661a22051a15ca23c2754cc4b2cda519~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1779287186\u0026x-signature=aXHBQINmOVaxWIPp7vOOAFwP0AI%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"50813468871","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"98"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":1,"reply_show_row":3,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读8小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":8,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":16407,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":28856,"reply_count":4,"show_pv":1928},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_digg_time":1769169627,"author_reply_time":1769169655,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"addition_comment":{"comment_id":"7619394761896313624","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"那个啥  两个黑客家境都不错的哦  不论是猫猫还是露西  都不至于用廉价义体的[偷笑]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1774033667,"group_id":"7578856835914927166","service_id":13,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"110368571728"}},"expand":{"book_id":"7578856835914927166","book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"7"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读43分钟后追评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":2593,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":0},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"comment_id":"7619390530285749016","common":{"comment_type":-90,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"看了一下  有几个地方的刻画不太行  首先是人物  老维第一次见到主角 啧 了一声  之前好几个别的角色也出现过这个啧  这过于趋同了  没有把每个重要角色的特点  特性立住  还有就是打斗  那个打斗太僵化了  一上来就是三个机器人 还按照数字排列一样  一个个的描写占据了什么位置  做了什么  还有就是对于机器人的描写过于的华丽辞藻了  身形高大  身形魁梧的机器人就完事了  后面没必要写  机器人造型那么详细的  两句话带过  主要写  机器人在这个场景里一步步推进  火力输出带来的压迫感  紧急感。改一改会很好。  后面就是我个人想法了  可以不看  系统文一点没关系  但是那个啥绿魔的东西  漫威的装备拿过来用  我总觉得有点别扭  我觉得前期可以给点纯数值方面的金手指  比如黑客天赋啦  超强义体耐受啦  然后顺理成章和猫猫学黑客技术  顺便装个逼  然后用黑客技术去旧网翻垃圾  这时候金手指给点便利  翻找出一些牛逼义体蓝图  或者装备蓝图，希望作者可以看看这个评论  希望作者可以写下去  毕竟我很喜欢赛博朋克2077  这类型的书我都看完了，最后  作者加油吧！[偷笑]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1774033459,"group_id":"7578856835914927166","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"写一写正好锻炼一下自己","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N26mrtnSRbKMVDBzkLUJfNM=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/286409685f7445598054292fb01c24e6~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1776621458\u0026x-signature=TL5BWORp4DO2ka8r5FSZprQ8sfM%3D","user_id":"110368571728","user_name":"手残党2008号"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"110368571728","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":true,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author_level_1","intro":"{\"title_name\":\"作家Lv.1\",\"title_id\":\"author_level_1\"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{\"title_text\":\"作家Lv.1\",\"title_default_color\":\"#FFFFFF\",\"title_dark_color\":\"#FFFFFF\",\"bg_default_color\":\"{\\\"start\\\":\\\"#FF9F31\\\",\\\"end\\\":\\\"#FFB95C\\\"}\",\"bg_dark_color\":\"{\\\"start\\\":\\\"#CC8029\\\",\\\"end\\\":\\\"#CC9349\\\"}\",\"title_dark_diaphaneity\":\"CC\"}","zh_title":"作家Lv.1"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7578856835914927166","book_info":{"abstract":"你是愿意当一个无名之辈，30岁插着尿管死在床上？还是就算活不到20岁，也要名流青史呢？椰汁城大舞台，没活你别来！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o661a22051a15ca23c2754cc4b2cda519~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"粉毛吉他手大孤独","author_id":"","book_id":"7578856835914927166","book_name":"赛博朋克，2072年的椰汁城","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#102848","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2012人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{\"category_id\":718,\"name\":\"动漫衍生\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=718\u0026name=动漫衍生\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026s
